name: LUMA_EXTEND
description: Whether to use the Luma 'extend' feature - which will first generate a video and then send it back to Luma to create a longer, extended version of the video.

name: LUMA_MODEL
description: Luma model to use for video generation.

name: LUMA_DURATION
description: Duration of generated videos.

name: LUMA_RESOLUTION
description: Output video resolution.

name: LUMA_POLL_INTERVAL
description: Seconds between polling Luma for video generation status.

name: LUMA_MAX_POLL_ATTEMPTS
description: Maximum number of polling attempts for Luma video generation before giving up.

name: TRANSCRIPTION_PROVIDER
description: Speech transcription provider.

name: GOOGLE_SPEECH_MODEL
description: Google Cloud Speech-to-Text V2 model to use for transcription.

name: GOOGLE_SPEECH_REGION
description: Google Cloud Speech-to-Text region or multi-region.

name: GOOGLE_SPEECH_LANGUAGE_CODES
description: Language codes for Speech-to-Text. Use ["auto"] for Chirp 3 automatic language detection.

name: GOOGLE_SPEECH_CHUNK_SECONDS
description: Maximum local audio chunk duration before sending to synchronous Speech-to-Text.

name: GOOGLE_SPEECH_MAX_INLINE_MB
description: Maximum inline audio payload size before forcing local chunking.

name: GEMINI_PROMPT_MODEL
description: Gemini model to use for Luma prompt generation.

name: GEMINI_THINKING_BUDGET
description: Thinking token budget for Gemini prompt generation. Use -1 for dynamic thinking, or 0 to disable thinking for Gemini 2.5 Flash.

name: GPT_SYSTEM_PROMPT
description: System prompt for the Gemini model (single-sentence version).
default: You are a creative video prompt engineer specializing in Luma Dream Machine. Your task is to transform dream descriptions into cinematic video prompts using clear, simple language. Be specific about useful visual elements and emotional tone. Keep the prompt concise but rich in visual detail, formatted as a single, succinct sentence.

name: GPT_SYSTEM_PROMPT_EXTEND
description: System prompt for the Gemini model (two-sentence/extended version).
default: You are a creative video prompt engineer specializing in transforming the dream transcription into a vivid prompt for video generation. Preserve the original meaning, core characters and their stated relationships, transformations, sequence of events, and emotional tone. Use clear, specific, cinematic visual language and format as two sentences. Break down the prompt into exactly two clear separate parts, using '*****' as a separator between part one and part two.

name: GPT_TEMPERATURE
description: Sampling temperature for Gemini.

name: CLOCK_FADE_IN_DURATION
description: Milliseconds taken for the clock to fade in.

name: CLOCK_FADE_OUT_DURATION
description: Milliseconds taken for the clock to fade out.

name: CLOCK_CONFIG_PATH
description: Path to the JSON file defining the clock's appearance and behavior.

name: PLAYBACK_DURATION
description: Duration (in seconds) for audio/video playback.

name: VIDEO_HISTORY_LIMIT
description: Number of videos to loop through in the device's history.

name: LOGO_FADE_IN_DURATION
description: Milliseconds taken for the logo to fade in.

name: LOGO_FADE_OUT_DURATION
description: Milliseconds taken for the logo to fade out.

name: TRANSITION_DELAY
description: Delay (in milliseconds) between UI transitions.

name: LOG_LEVEL
description: Sets the logging verbosity.

name: DB_PATH
description: Path to the database file.

name: HOST
description: The internal network interface the server binds to.

name: PORT
description: The port the server listens on.

name: TOTAL_BACKGROUND_IMAGES
description: Number of available background images for the UI (in static/images/background).

name: AUDIO_CHANNELS
description: Number of audio channels to record.

name: AUDIO_SAMPLE_WIDTH
description: Audio sample width in bytes.

name: AUDIO_FRAME_RATE
description: Audio sample rate in Hz.

name: RECORDINGS_DIR
description: Directory where audio recordings are stored.

name: LUMA_API_URL
description: Base URL for the Luma Labs API.

name: LUMA_GENERATIONS_ENDPOINT
description: Endpoint for generating videos with Luma Labs.

name: LUMA_ASPECT_RATIO
description: Aspect ratio for generated videos.

name: VIDEOS_DIR
description: Directory where generated videos are stored.

name: THUMBS_DIR
description: Directory where video thumbnails are stored.

name: FFMPEG_BRIGHTNESS
description: Brightness adjustment for video processing.

name: FFMPEG_VIBRANCE
description: Vibrance adjustment for video processing.

name: FFMPEG_DENOISE_THRESHOLD
description: Denoise threshold for video processing.

name: FFMPEG_BILATERAL_SIGMA
description: Bilateral filter sigma value for video processing.

name: FFMPEG_NOISE_STRENGTH
description: Noise strength for video processing.

name: GPIO_PIN
description: GPIO pin number used for the physical button.

name: GPIO_FLASK_URL
description: URL of the Flask server for GPIO events.

name: GPIO_SINGLE_TAP_ENDPOINT
description: API endpoint for single-tap button events.

name: GPIO_DOUBLE_TAP_ENDPOINT
description: API endpoint for double-tap button events.

name: GPIO_DEVICE_STATE_ENDPOINT
description: API endpoint used by the GPIO service to read the browser state.

name: GPIO_SCREEN_SLEEP_ENDPOINT
description: API endpoint used by the GPIO service after blanking the display.

name: GPIO_SCREEN_WAKE_ENDPOINT
description: API endpoint used by the GPIO service after waking the display.

name: GPIO_SINGLE_TAP_MAX_DURATION
description: Max duration (seconds) for a single tap to be recognized.

name: GPIO_DOUBLE_TAP_MAX_INTERVAL
description: Max interval (seconds) between taps for a double tap.

name: GPIO_DEBOUNCE_TIME
description: Debounce time (seconds) for button presses.

name: GPIO_STARTUP_DELAY
description: Delay (seconds) before GPIO service starts after boot.

name: GPIO_SAMPLING_RATE
description: Sampling rate (seconds) for reading GPIO pin state.

name: SCREEN_SLEEP_ENABLED
description: Whether to enable host-side display blanking after clock inactivity.

name: SCREEN_SLEEP_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
description: Seconds of clock inactivity before blanking the display at night.

name: SCREEN_SLEEP_MODE
description: When screen sleep is allowed.

name: SCREEN_SLEEP_STATE_POLL_INTERVAL
description: Seconds between GPIO service polls of the browser state.

name: LOCATION_PROVIDER
description: Provider used to infer device latitude, longitude, and timezone.

name: SOLAR_PROVIDER
description: Provider used to fetch sunrise and sunset times.

name: SOLAR_CACHE_PATH
description: Local JSON cache for location and sunrise/sunset schedules.

name: DEFAULT_LATITUDE
description: Fallback latitude used when IP geolocation and cache are unavailable.

name: DEFAULT_LONGITUDE
description: Fallback longitude used when IP geolocation and cache are unavailable.

name: DEFAULT_TIMEZONE
description: Fallback IANA timezone used when IP geolocation and cache are unavailable.

name: SCREEN_SLEEP_BLANK_COMMAND
description: Host command used to blank the Raspberry Pi display.

name: SCREEN_SLEEP_WAKE_COMMAND
description: Host command used to wake the Raspberry Pi display.

name: SCREEN_SLEEP_DISPLAY
description: X11 DISPLAY value used when running screen blank/wake commands.
